/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/cApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/cMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/login.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/soundIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/screenCapturing.cpp.o -o main  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.14.0 -lwx_gtk3u_xrc-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_qa-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lportaudio -lasound -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.14.0
